en.name: Level 6 — Lights Out
en.shortDescription: A pitch-black level of endless tight smooth-concrete hallways where total darkness and silence wear down the mind.
en.atmosphere: Absolute darkness and silence breed paranoia; auditory hallucinations of scuttling, breathing and whispering are common.
en.tips: Navigate by touch. Never flip a found light switch. Avoid the Mimicry. Follow the sound of waves toward the Level 7 exit.
